subparts.text: Differentiate between parallel and federated databases. 1
Explain the role of virtualization in query evaluation in parallel databases. 1
What is the difference between BASE and ACID properties in distributed databases? 2
Explain the concept of schema on read versus schema on write with suitable examples. 2
What are embedded documents in MongoDB, and how are they different from arrays? 3
Explain the concept of consistency and replication in the Cassandra data store. 3
What is the role of indexing in Neo4J, and how does it improve query performance? 4
Describe the key features of the RIAK data store. 4

questions.question_text: Discuss the obstacles to scaling up RDBMS and the measures to improve PL/SQL performance. Provide examples. 1
Elaborate on the performance parameters for parallel databases and their impact on database scalability. 1
Describe the challenges of query optimization in distributed databases. Provide strategies to overcome these issues. 2
Discuss XML database schema design strategies with an example of implementing XQuery and XPath. 2
Compare and contrast MongoDB with XML databases in terms of data modeling and querying. 3
Explain the column family structure in Cassandra and its advantages over traditional relational database systems. 3
Explain the representation of 1:1, 1:N, and M:N relationships in Neo4J, along with their physical storage mechanisms. 4
Discuss the distribution, availability, consistency, and replication mechanisms in key-value data stores like RIAK. 4
